/usr/bin/ar qc libobf_core.a CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/frontend/annotations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/frontend/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/analysis/function_features.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/policy/policy_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/report/function_report.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/block_split.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/bogus_control_flow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/constant_encoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/control_flattening.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/artifact_cleanup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/entropy_initialization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/function_outlining.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/instruction_substitution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/mba.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/opaque_gep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/opaque_predicates.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/transforms/string_encoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/vm/candidate_analysis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/vm/bytecode_decode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/vm/dispatch_emission.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/vm/handler_lowering_control.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/vm/handler_lowering_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/vm/handler_lowering_scalar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/vm/value_materialization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_core.dir/lib/vm/virtualize.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libobf_core.a
